dod-ebts:Caveat.nc:CaveatText: **Notional/Example Text**This data is provided by the XYZ Ministry of Defense to your forces and to your forces//agency//department in confidence, for internal use only. It can only be used to support Operation Global Mission mandates and must not be used in a manner inconsistent with international law. Data must be extinguished from any record under the control of your forces//agency//department 5 years after input at the latest, unless the individual poses a current threat. Any use of this data for purposes outside of the above mandate requires prior approval by the Government of XYZ **Notional/For demonstration purposes only**
dod-ebts:Caveat.dod-ebts:CaveatReleasability: File releasable to 29 NATO Member Nations

biom-4.0.1:PhysicalFeatureImage.biom-4.0.1:SourceExternalFileReferenceTe: URI of image referenced instead of included in the record

biom-4.0.1:CaptureOrganization.nc:OrganizationName: the name of the agency referenced in Field 14.004: Source agency/ SRC.
biom-4.0.1:CaptureOrganization.nc:OrganizationUnitName: Capture organization name, such as when friction ridge prints are taken from a decedent's body in a morgue. The coroner's office or medical examiner's office would be CON.

biom-4.0.1:CaptureOrganization.nc:OrganizationName: the name of the agency referenced in Field X.004: Source agency/ SRC.
biom-4.0.1:CaptureOrganization.nc:OrganizationUnitName: Capture organization name, such as when friction ridge prints are taken from a decedent's body in a morgue. The coroner's office or medical examiner's office would be CON.

biom-4.0.1:DNADonor.biom-4.0.1:DNADonorCollectionLocationDes: 2 centimeter x 2 centimeter x 3 centimeter deep sample cut from tissue of leg of the unidentified body
